step_rationale: Myocardial injury marker released from damaged cardiomyocytes during ischemic necrosis.
mechanism: Cardiac myosin-binding protein C is released into circulation upon cardiomyocyte necrosis, marking myocardial injury in acute MI.

references.title: Cardiac myosin-binding protein C in ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
references.journal: European heart journal. Acute cardiovascular care

references.title: Myocardial injury biomarkers and their assays: advances, insights, and future directions.
Novel biomarkers of cardiovascular disease: Applications in clinical practice.
references.journal: Critical reviews in clinical laboratory sciences

references.title: Surviving the infarct: A profile of cardiac myosin binding protein-C pathogenicity, diagnostic utility, and proteomics in the ischemic myocardium.
